extracted.title: TE Operational Flow Order -- UPDATE
extracted.description:
In order to maintain the operational integrity of the system, TE is updating the previously posted Operational Flow Order (OFO) pursuant to Section 4.3 of the General Terms and Conditions of TE's FERC Gas Tariff effective 9:00 AM CCT, February 6, 2026, to all OBA and Transportation Contracts, with the exception of those governed by a FERC gas tariff, in Texas Eastern's Market Area Zones M2-24, M2-30 and M3.

Additionally, effective 9:00 AM CCT, February 5, 2026, TE is lifting the previously posted Operational Flow Order (OFO) for Texas Eastern's Market Area Zones M1-24 and M1-30.

This OFO does not affect the ability of TE to receive or deliver quantities of gas for scheduled nominations to any customer or pipeline.

The penalty will be equal to three times the daily Platts Gas Daily "Daily Price Survey" posting for the High Common price for the geographical region, as defined in Section 8.5(a) of the General Terms and Conditions of TE's FERC Gas Tariff for the day on which such violation occurred. TE will not permit retroactive nominations to avoid an OFO penalty except for shippers who can acquire day ending Due Shipper supply for No Due Pipe OFO's and Due Pipe supply for Due Shipper OFO's.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.

Please refer to the table below for the effected TETCO zones, dates, and tolerance percentages.

Zone table summary:
- M1-24: Gas Day Feb 4 OFO in Effect (No Due Pipe 5%/250); Gas Day Feb 5 No OFO; Gas Day Feb 6 and until further notice No OFO
- M1-30: Gas Day Feb 4 OFO in Effect (No Due Pipe 5%/250); Gas Day Feb 5 No OFO; Gas Day Feb 6 and until further notice No OFO
- M2-24: Gas Day Feb 4 OFO in Effect (No Due Pipe 5%/250); Gas Day Feb 5 OFO in Effect (No Due Pipe 5%/250); Gas Day Feb 6 and until further notice OFO in Effect (No Due Pipe 2%/250)
- M2-30: Gas Day Feb 4 OFO in Effect (No Due Pipe 5%/250); Gas Day Feb 5 OFO in Effect (No Due Pipe 5%/250); Gas Day Feb 6 and until further notice OFO in Effect (No Due Pipe 2%/250)
- M3: Gas Day Feb 4 OFO in Effect (No Due Pipe 5%/250); Gas Day Feb 5 OFO in Effect (No Due Pipe 5%/250); Gas Day Feb 6 and until further notice OFO in Effect (No Due Pipe 2%/250)
- ETX: No OFO
- STX: No OFO
- WLA: No OFO
- ELA: No OFO
- Customer Specific: No OFO

NOTE:
Deliveries No DP: Shippers are not to take more than scheduled
Deliveries No DS: Shippers are not to take less than scheduled
Receipts No DP: Shippers are not to give less than scheduled
Receipts No DS: Shippers are not to give more than scheduled
